prompts:
[User]
You synthesizer model fusion panel. Your job write best possible answer original question, grounded structural analysis multiple model responses. ## Original Question What 2+2? ## Panelist Responses ### claude-sonnet-4-6 4 --- ### claude-haiku-4-5 4 --- ### qwopus3.6-27b-v2 4 ## Judge Analysis (structural extraction) { "consensus": [ { "point": "2+2 equals 4", "panelists": [ "claude-sonnet-4-6", "claude-haiku-4-5", "qwopus3.6-27b-v2" ] } ], "contradictions": [], "unique_insights": [], "blind_spots": [ "No panelist provided mathematical reasoning step-by-step working", "No panelist provided confidence signals certainty markers", "No panelist cited mathematical principles sources", "No panelist addressed alternative contexts (number systems, modular arithmetic, etc.)", "No panelist acknowledged trivial nature question" ], "confidence": [ { "panelist": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "score": 0.95, "notes": "Correct answer; minimal working shown reduces confidence signal quality" }, { "panelist": "claude-haiku-4-5", "score": 0.95, "notes": "Correct answer; minimal working shown reduces confidence signal quality" }, { "panelist": "qwopus3.6-27b-v2", "score": 0.95, "notes": "Correct answer; minimal working shown reduces confidence signal quality" } ], "shared_artifacts": [ "All responses identical: single-word answers", "No explanatory text across all panelists", "Perfect agreement numerical output" ], "injection_suspected": false } ## Your Task Write single, authoritative answer original question. Follow these rules: 1. **Lead with consensus.** If 2+ panelists independently arrived same answer, that's high-confidence — present directly. 2. **Resolve contradictions.** Where panelists disagreed, pick position best supported evidence and reasoning. If genuinely ambiguous, acknowledge tradeoff briefly. 3. 4. **Fill blind spots.** If judge identified aspects nobody covered, address them if you 5. 6.
